chosen_action.title: Deliver refreshed primary-repo-flat publisher contact packet for immediate manual execution

why_this_action.summary: The current Codeberg-first publisher packet was refreshed on 2026-05-25 with a materially changed target set (ctxt.dev / Signum, NxCode, TIMEWELL) and has been prepared repeatedly but not yet delivered on the current review window.
verification: marketing_2026-05-24_primary_repo_flat_contact_manual_delivery.json delivered the older 2026-05-24 packet, not the refreshed 2026-05-25 packet.

marketing_2026-05-25_034038_primary_repo_flat_contact_handoff_packet_execution.json and marketing_2026-05-25_primary_repo_flat_contact_handoff_packet_execution.json show the 2026-05-25 packet as prepared, not delivered.
marketing_execution_board_latest.md still lists the primary-repo-flat publisher contact packet as the best executable asset waiting.

expected_outcome: Immediate manual execution of at least one refreshed publisher-contact request that can create a Codeberg-first citation path without waiting for another automated lane.

measurement_window.success_metric: At least one publisher contact attempt is sent from the refreshed 2026-05-25 packet, followed by any attributable qualified repo inspection or Codeberg adoption movement.
measurement_window.kill_condition: If still unsent by the review checkpoint, replace this lane instead of refreshing the same packet again.
